principle: Unfinished work remains in the implementation pipeline with an executable next action; it is not reported as an unmanaged blocker.

stages.evidence: Planning repository audit validation passed before app execution.
Mock provider route produces MDR packet, routing decision, validation result, token accounting, and execution record.
scripts/advance-pipeline.sh ollama-port-handoff reported that Ollama is not listening on 11434.
LEMONADE_BUILD_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=240 scripts/advance-pipeline.sh lemonade-runtime-start started the pinned CPU-only Lemonade service on 127.0.0.1:13305.
scripts/advance-pipeline.sh lemonade-runtime-verify passed against /api/v1/models and loopback-only Compose configuration.

stages.command: FIREWORKS_API_KEY=<secret> python3 -m amd_hackathon_app.cli run-scenario --scenario reasoning-escalation-boundary --provider fireworks
stages.next_action: Verify Fireworks provider once credentials are available through environment variables.
Pull exact candidate model IDs through Lemonade with LEMONADE_MODEL_PULL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS bounding each model pull.
Run profile benchmarks after candidate models are available, then compare quality before token and latency metrics.
Advance only after benchmark evidence selects exactly one local model and organiser packaging constraints are known.
